title: Tools!
description: A mod that adds a lot of ores, blocks, tools, and more
body:
**Tools!** is a modification for Minecraft 1.12.2 that adds a variety of items, decorative blocks, and tool ores. This modification is aimed at simultaneously making gameplay easier and more challenging(The mod's best tools are very effective, and the armor will provide excellent protection. But if you decide to craft them, be prepared for difficulties obtaining the necessary materials). The peculiarity of the modification lies in its complex crafts, which will force you to spend a considerable amount of time in the game.

The modification was made using the **MCreator** program:
[https://mcreator.net/](https://mcreator.net/)

**!!!WARNING!!!** : The modification is in development, so there is a possibility that some things will not be in it
